candidate_definitions.text: StyleTTS 2: Towards Human-Level Text-to-Speech through Style Diffusion and Adversarial Training with Large Speech Language Models

> In this paper, we present StyleTTS 2, a text-to-speech (TTS) model that leverages style diffusion and adversarial training with large speech language models (SLMs) to achieve human-level TTS synthesis. StyleTTS 2 differs from its predecessor by modeling styles as a latent rand…
PyTorch implementation of Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network

PyTorch implementation of Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network (D-TDNN) in our paper ["Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network for Speaker Verification"](https://www.isca-speech.org/archive/Interspeech_2020/abstracts/1275.html) (INTERSPEECH 2020).

PyTorch implementation of Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network (D-TDNN) in our paper ["Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network for Speaker Verification"](https://www.isca-speech.org/archive/Interspeech_2020/abstracts/1275.html) (INTERSPEECH 2020).
